changelog:
🚀 AUTO CAPTIONS PRO v1.4.0 - THE BATCH REVOLUTION

NEW FEATURES:
• Seamless Batch Merge Mode: Generate captions for 5, 10, or 50 audio clips at once! The extension now automatically merges all transcribed data into one single, master "Edit Captions" tab for your entire timeline.
• Performance Assassin (Kill Switch): The "Stop" and "Cancel" buttons are now 100% asynchronous. No more AE "Not Responding" screens and zero black CMD window popups!
• Live Cloud Versioning: See your active extension status directly in the Command Center.

STABILITY FIXES:
• Fixed "Add Custom" preset glitch where FFX files wouldn't save on certain Windows builds.
• Improved Silence Remover precision to eliminate gaps between Whisper AI blocks.
• Optimized transcription engine to prevent memory leaks during ultra-long batch renders.

Happy Captions! ⚡
